3440 Maple Dr, Fort Dodge, IA 50501, USA

On USPS property are five large crabapples, loaded with thousands of beautiful big, largely flawless tart fruit up to an inch in diameter. 
Use them to make pectin, a decadent hard cider, or simply quarter them and dehydrate for a candy-like treat reminiscent
Falling Fruit access: Private but overhanging.
